field.name: source_element_id
field.label: PLG_ELEMENT_EMUNDUSREADONLY_SOURCE_ELEMENT_LABEL
field.query: SELECT fe.id AS value, CONCAT(fl.db_table_name, ' :: ', COALESCE(NULLIF(fe.label, ''), fe.name)) AS text FROM #__fabrik_elements AS fe INNER JOIN #__fabrik_formgroup AS ffg ON ffg.group_id = fe.group_id INNER JOIN #__fabrik_lists AS fl ON fl.form_id = ffg.form_id WHERE fe.published = 1 AND fe.plugin NOT IN ('emundusreadonly', 'captcha', 'button', 'display') ORDER BY fl.db_table_name, fe.label, fe.name
